title: wikstroemia australis
intro: Wikstroemia australis, also known as the New Zealand Wikstroemia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, native to New Zealand and Norfolk Island. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wikstroemia australis include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Wikstroemia australis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
